genes._note: Verified: CSTB logFC=2.3 in TCGA-COAD tumor vs normal (limma-voom). Consistent across ITIP Phase A, CSTB module 1, and published TCGA-COAD analyses.
PD-L1 known to be upregulated in MSI-H CRC subtype. Value is approximate from published TCGA-COAD data.
KRAS is typically not differentially expressed at mRNA level — mutation ≠ expression change. Tests agent's ability to report non-significant results.

meta.status: READY — 3 genes, CSTB verified from ITIP/CSTB data
meta.declaration: GT reflects one analytical pipeline (limma-voom on TCGA-COAD). NOT a consensus gold standard. All results are exploratory, conditional on TCGA-COAD.
